panels.title: Cache hit ratio
panels.description: cacheRead tokens as a share of all cache traffic (cacheRead / (cacheRead + cacheCreation)). Higher = more prompt-cache reuse, lower spend per turn.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email", type=~"cacheRead|cacheCreation"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Cost per commit
panels.description: Total estimated cost divided by commits produced over the range — spend per delivered commit.

targets.expr: sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / sum(increase(claude_code_commit_count_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Cost per PR
panels.description: Total estimated cost divided by pull requests created over the range.

targets.expr: sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / sum(increase(claude_code_pull_request_count_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Cost per active hour
panels.description: Total estimated cost divided by engaged active time (active_time seconds / 3600) — spend normalized by real usage.

targets.expr: sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / (sum(increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / 3600)

panels.title: Cost share by model
panels.description: How estimated spend splits across models — right-sizing signal (e.g. opus share on trivial work).

targets.expr: sum by (model) (increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Cache hit ratio over time
panels.description: cacheRead share of cache traffic across the range — watch for drops that signal wasteful context re-sending.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email", type="cacheRead"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email", type=~"cacheRead|cacheCreation"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Cost per 1K lines changed
panels.description: Total estimated cost divided by (lines of code changed / 1000) — spend per delivered code volume.

targets.expr: sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / (sum(increase(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{organization_id=~"$organization_id", project=~"$project", jira_epic=~"$jira_epic", jira_story=~"$jira_story", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__range])) / 1000)
